title: Urgent Opening Teacher at British Council India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at British Council India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at British Council India Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About British Council India Digital Technologies:
British Council India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India Digital Technologies!
